name: Communication Channel Errors
description: Category-level CWE grouping weaknesses related to improper handling of communication channels and access paths, including problems in creating, managing, or removing alternate channels. Vulnerability mapping is prohibited — use specific descendants like CWE-419, CWE-420, CWE-425, or CWE-918 instead.
detection_pattern: N/A — category CWE, not a concrete weakness
